title: Cold-start discipline skill + paired pipeline rule + portfolio credential rule
description: Author and land three schema-bound instances in luh-tech/schema-registry to operationalize cold-start verification ritual and credential-echo prohibition. Skill instance org/cold-start-discipline pairs with RULE-PIPELINE-COLD-START-VERIFICATION-1; RULE-COMMS-CREDENTIAL-PATTERN-REDACTION-1 lands as portfolio-wide rule referenced by the skill but not pair-bound to it. Filed after three consecutive cold-start failures on 2026-06-07.

outputs.description: Skill instance org/cold-start-discipline at skills/_instances/org/cold-start-discipline/skill-instance.json. lifecycleStatus working-model, triggerMode pushy, category org, pairedRule references RULE-PIPELINE-COLD-START-VERIFICATION-1. Generated SKILL.md sibling via luhtech-skill-generate v1.0.0.

behavior.directives contains 6 directive objects each with action and rationale
behavior.antiPatterns contains 5 anti-pattern objects each with pattern and instead
triggerContext contains 3 precondition objects each with at least one exampleCue

notes: Cross-repo doctrine F0B85LNSTC4 single-anchor variant: all artifacts land in SR via single PR with no EB-CLI execute phase. BT skill-sync.py SKILL_SET bump happens in a subsequent separate deliverable (d-2026-06-XX-bt-skill-sync-cold-start-discipline) per repo scope-lock per memory rule 18.
